hero.p: I build digital infrastructure for Swiss and international companies. Website, marketing, design, AI, media — whatever you need to grow.

problem.intro: Most companies need a few things from their digital setup:
lines: A website that actually works. Marketing that reaches the right people. Technology that doesn't fight you.
And ideally: one person who understands all of it, so you don't have to coordinate four different vendors.
Over 20 years in digital — marketing, design, code, and business operations. I've built websites, run campaigns, launched ecommerce, and integrated AI into real workflows.
I speak marketing with founders and code with developers. I think in systems, deliver in results, and keep things simple.
One point of contact. From first conversation to finished product.

capabilities.label: Services provided
capabilities.note: Most projects need all three. Some just one. I adapt to you, not to my offering.

for.label: Who it's for
items: Founders who don't want to coordinate five people.
Established companies whose website is from 2019.
SMEs disappointed by Localsearch or Wix.
Premium brands that deserve a presence matching their quality.
Public figures looking to build media presence.
If you're thinking "we really should..." — it's time.

services.intro: A website without marketing is invisible. Marketing without technology is inefficient. Content without strategy is noise. I offer all three. You choose what you need.

cta.p: Get in touch. No strings attached.

lines: Over 20 years in digital — marketing, design, websites, ecommerce, and business operations. Self-employed for over a decade, mostly building behind the scenes for other people's brands.
I speak marketing with founders and code with developers. I design, I build, I deploy. One person, end to end.
Along the way I also earned an MSc in Blockchain & Digital Currencies — because I like understanding how things actually work, not just how people talk about them.
Now I'm combining all of that experience with AI to deliver better, faster results for clients.
Open to partnerships, advisory, and interesting conversations.

philosophy.title: Let's work together
items: No bullshit. No buzzword bingo. I tell you what you need, not what costs the most.
I work directly with decision-makers. No account manager in between.
I deliver. Not decks, not concepts. Results.

cta.p: Get in touch. No strings attached.

contact.intro: Tell me where you stand. I'll tell you what you need.
